value.rootCause: Flex Consumption does not wake a scaled-to-zero app for a plain timer trigger, so graph-renew (NCRONTAB) logged 0 executions in 7d and subscriptions were heading for a silent lapse (azure-diagnostician root-caused, App Insights component cespk-orch-dev).
value.fix: Durable eternal-orchestration subscriptionMonitorOrchestrator (instanceId subscription-monitor-singleton, runtimeStatus Running): renew activity -> durable timer (SUBSCRIPTION_MONITOR_INTERVAL_HOURS, default 6h) -> continueAsNew. A durable timer message WAKES a scaled-to-zero Flex app (Microsoft Learn), so renewal fires unattended with NO always-ready instance and NO external scheduler. Bootstrapped by intake-starter (any intake traffic) and by the graph-renew HTTP route; the original graph-renew timer is retained as a backstop.

subscriptionRenewalRisk.sourceCommand: durable mgmt GET /runtime/webhooks/durabletask/instances/subscription-monitor-singleton (runtimeStatus Running, name subscriptionMonitorOrchestrator); also confirmed via POST /api/graph-renew JSON monitor.status=Running
subscriptionRenewalRisk.note: OPERATOR WATCH: prove an unattended durable-monitor renewal using a source-bearing custom event that distinguishes durable_monitor from manual_http and timer_backstop. The 2026-07-05 deployed runSubscriptionMaintenance code now prunes subscriptions whose mailbox or folder leaves configuration, guarded against an empty or misread mailbox list wiping all subscriptions. The current generic graph-renewal-success trace cannot distinguish its invocation source and is not certification evidence. Belt-and-braces renewal fallback if the durable timer ever fails: az functionapp scale config always-ready set -g rg-collisionspike-dev -n cespk-orch-dev --settings function:graph-renew=1 (always-ready cost — flagged, NOT enabled).

appInsightsComponents.note: CORRECTS the stale 'orch/api telemetry shared in cespike-parser-ai-dev' claim: cespk-api-dev and cespk-orch-dev EACH have their OWN App Insights component (matching the app name). Only the Python parser/retained fns log to cespike-parser-ai-dev; OCR to cespkocr-ai-dev. Post-2026-06-30-deploy telemetry: api 0 exceptions / 0 5xx (150 reqs); orch 0 5xx (79 reqs), exceptions are ONLY the pre-existing graph-webhook 499/cold-start Kestrel BadHttpRequestException residual (present in the pre-deploy baseline too, not a regression).

boxSmoke.docDrift: 2026-06-30 (work-todo-spike): re-verified AFTER the box-fn config-zip redeploy that ADDED upload_file (POST /api/box/folders/{id}/files; Blob->Box archive mirror, scope-locked to BOX_ALLOWED_ROOT_ID). Authenticated READ of the allowed root 392761581105 still returns 200 (now 7 case folders: ACSP26001, AX26001, KBS26001, QDOS26001, QDOS26002, ...). box-fn route count 9->10. NO write/upload performed (read-only smoke under the allowed root only). Box JWT auth LIVE since 2026-06-28.

gates.sourceCommand: az functionapp config appsettings list -g rg-collisionspike-dev -n <app> --query "[?contains(name,'BOX_')||contains(name,'EVA_')||contains(name,'ENRICHMENT')||contains(name,'VALUATION')||name=='GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES']"
gates.verifiedAt: 2026-06-28T23:55:15Z (BOX/ENRICHMENT gates); 2026-06-29T15:14Z (GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES); 2026-06-30T07:50Z (added OCR_FN_* on orch + BOX_FN_* on api -- work-todo-spike wiring); 2026-07-02T15:50Z (OUTLOOK_MOVE_* -- TKT-054); 2026-07-03T15:25Z (nine-task activation flips); 2026-07-03T16:10Z (TRIAGE_* flips); 2026-07-04T13:05Z (AUDIT_CASES_ENABLED flip, both apps); 2026-07-09T08:00Z (ASSISTANT_TOOLSET_V2 + GLOBAL_SEARCH_ENABLED flips on api, readback-verified); 2026-07-10T21:10Z (operator-authorized activation batch: BOX_REG_FOLDER_ENABLED=true on orch, RETRO_BOX_ARCHIVE_ROOT_IDS=4077648161 + MCP_SERVER_ENABLED=true on api — all three SET+readback-verified)
gates.docDrift: 2026-07-10T21:10Z (operator-authorized activation batch): THREE gate changes, all readback-verified. BOX_REG_FOLDER_ENABLED '(absent)'->'true' on cespk-orch-dev (TKT-034 step-2 — the reg-keyed Box holding folder for unmatched image emails is ACTING; operator approved the non-Case/PO folder-naming semantic). RETRO_BOX_ARCHIVE_ROOT_IDS added as '4077648161' on cespk-api-dev (TKT-107 read-only archive assist — arms archiveConfigured()/archive_lookup only; root confirmed read-only via box CLI first; stays '(absent)' on cespk-orch-dev DELIBERATELY — the minting R2 rung waits on gated.md D11 sequence alignment). MCP_SERVER_ENABLED '(absent)'->'true' on cespk-api-dev (TKT-110 — the CollisionSpike MCP Client Flow A app-reg was created the same pass, see mcpAppRegistration; unauthenticated POST /api/mcp -> 401 fail-closed post-flip). Prior: 2026-07-10 (TKT-146): IMAGE_ROLE_CLASSIFY_ENABLED added to the cespk-orch-dev map as 'true' — pre-existing drift fixed: the TKT-064 go-live set it on orch but this block was never updated (re-verified live via az appsettings list this session); recorded now because the new box-classify-sweep timer is gated on it (+ BOX_API_ENABLED). NO gate value changed and NO new app-setting added this pass — the sweep's cap (25) and period (5 min) are code constants. Prior: 2026-07-09 (PLAN-003 final wave D1): ASSISTANT_TOOLSET_V2=true + GLOBAL_SEARCH_ENABLED=true SET+readback-verified on cespk-api-dev (operator-granted flips — TKT-066/069 assistant read toolset + TKT-072/096 global search; unauthenticated GET /api/search probe -> 401 fail-closed). ASSISTANT_WRITE_TIER_ENABLED and MCP_SERVER_ENABLED added to tracking as '(absent)' — BOTH stay operator-only (the write tier needs the per-capability DPIA/E2-G5 sign-off; MCP needs the Entra app-registration only the operator creates — docs/gated.md F4/F6; neither flipped/created this wave by explicit instruction). Prior: 2026-07-09 (PLAN-003 lifecycle wave): REPLAY_BACKFILL_ENABLED REMOVED from this block — the app-setting was DELETED live on cespk-orch-dev and the driver + gate removed from code (TKT-106; the wipe-and-rebuild path is non-viable per TKT-059's finding, which is preserved in that ticket). DONE_SENT_EMAIL_ENABLED added as '(absent)' — the NEW dark gate for the TKT-095 sent-email done-detector (default off; flipping it makes orch subscription maintenance CREATE SentItems Graph subscriptions per intake mailbox and flipping back prunes them; no subscription was created this wave). Detector (c) EVA poll skeleton rides the existing EVA_API_ENABLED (still absent). Prior: 2026-07-09 (PLAN-003 intake wave): BOX_REG_FOLDER_ENABLED added to tracking as '(absent)' — the NEW dark gate for the TKT-034 reg-keyed Box holding-folder rung (default off in code; the operator must approve the non-Case/PO folder-naming semantic before flipping). Not set live. Prior: 2026-07-09 (PLAN-003 classifier wave): TRIAGE_PRE_INSTRUCTION_ENABLED=true SET+verified on cespk-orch-dev (TKT-084 lane go-live, operator-granted; DDL taxonomy-v3 delta applied first per deploy-order). ALSO corrected pre-existing drift: TRIAGE_AUTO_ATTACH_ENABLED is LIVE 'true' on cespk-orch-dev (verified via az appsettings list this session) but was never added to this block when flipped. Prior: 2026-07-09 (TKT-080 verifier finding): gates.value corrected — RETRO_OUTLOOK_SEARCH_ENABLED was recorded '(absent)' but has been LIVE 'true' on cespk-orch-dev since the 2026-07-07 dark-gate audit (the flip was narrated in verifiedBy but the gates block was never updated); REPLAY_BACKFILL_ENABLED value normalised to plain 'false' (the inline annotation made VERIFY_LIVE diff on every run — context: turned back off after the 2026-07-05 dry-run, TKT-059/106). Prior: 2026-07-08 (TKT-115): OCR_FN_URL on cespk-orch-dev CORRECTED from the wrong FC1 host https://cespkocr-fn-dev-glju3v.azurewebsites.net (NXDOMAIN) to the ACA ingress FQDN https://cespkocr-fn-dev-glju3v.proudwave-aa00ada9.uksouth.azurecontainerapps.io — the OCR app is Functions-on-Azure-Container-Apps, not FC1, so the old host did not resolve and ALL plate-OCR + scanned-PDF-OCR calls failed 'fetch failed' from 2026-07-04 (when PLATE_OCR_ENABLED went live) until this fix. Config-only, no redeploy (setting change restarts orch). Endpoint proven reachable+authenticating from the new value: /api/plate-ocr + /api/ocr-pdf = 401 (no key) and 400 (with the KV ocr-fn-key on an empty body); old host still NXDOMAINs. Behavioural proof on a live intake with a vehicle photo (registration_visible via OCR fallback; cespkocr-ai-dev receiving orch-originated requests) is verify-stage. Robustness follow-up: derive the OCR host from az defaultHostName at deploy time — the ACA infix (proudwave-aa00ada9) changes if the managed env/app is recreated. Prior: 2026-07-04: AUDIT_CASES_ENABLED=true on BOTH apps (user-instructed go-live; D10 delta applied FIRST per the delta's deploy-order warning; shadow-review step waived by the user). Prior: 2026-07-03 second wave: all four TRIAGE_* behaviour gates =true on orch (D7 taxonomy delta confirmed live first, per the delta's deploy-order warning); parser redeployed with the taxonomy-v2 engine. Prior: 2026-07-03 nine-task activation: OUTLOOK_MOVE_ENABLED=true on BOTH apps (user-instructed; Exchange Mail.ReadWrite grant still pending - moves 403 until B4 steps 1-2 done); orch PLATE_OCR_ENABLED/OCR_SCANNED_PDF_ENABLED/EMAIL_AI_ENABLED=true + AI_MODEL_ENDPOINT/AI_MODEL_DEPLOYMENT=gpt-5; api EVIDENCE_BLOB_* + LOCATION_ASSIST_*/AZURE_MAPS_ENABLED/LOCATION_SUGGEST_FN_* (location-assist live). Prior: 2026-07-02 TKT-054: OUTLOOK_MOVE_ENABLED ABSENT on both apps (dark by design — operator-blocked on the Mail.ReadWrite Exchange-RBAC re-consent, gated.md B4); OUTLOOK_MOVE_QUEUE_SERVICE_URL set on api only (the enqueue target — orch consumes the same queue via AzureWebJobsStorage); api MI holds Storage Queue Data Message Sender on cespkorchstdev01. Prior: 2026-06-30 work-todo-spike NEW wiring app-settings (tracked here so verify-live diffs them): orch OCR_FN_URL (plain host cespkocr-fn-dev-glju3v) + OCR_FN_KEY (KV ref cespk-pg-kv-dev/ocr-fn-key) for registration-visible plate OCR; api BOX_FN_URL (plain host cespkbox-fn-v76a47) + BOX_FN_KEY (KV ref cespk-pg-kv-dev/boxwebhook-fn-key, reused) for the Case/PO allocator new-provider Box fallback -- both follow the established *_FN_URL=plain / *_FN_KEY=KV-ref convention. Feature gates UNCHANGED: BOX_API_ENABLED, BOX_FOLDER_AT_INTAKE_ENABLED, BOX_FILEREQUEST_ENABLED are all 'true' on BOTH api and orch — Box is ACTIVATED, not off. ENRICHMENT_ENABLED and PDF_MAPPER_ENABLED are 'true' on both. EVA_API_ENABLED, VALUATION_ENABLED are not set (effectively off). BOX_EMBED_ENABLED and BOX_METADATA_ENABLED are no longer tracked here — both gates were RETIRED FROM CODE 2026-07-03 (the embed and metadata options were formally dropped, not merely left unset). GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES = info@ + engineers@ + desk@ (the production target; test mailbox digital@ removed in the 2026-06-29 mailbox cutover; info@/desk@ minIntakeDate 2026-06-29, engineers@ 2026-06-27). NOTE: PDF_MAPPER_ENABLED=true was unrecorded before the 2026-06-29 re-verification; CLAUDE.md's gate list describes default-off SEMANTICS, not current live values.

MCP_SERVER_ENABLED=true set on cespk-api-dev the same pass (readback-verified; unauthenticated POST /api/mcp → 401 'Missing bearer token' both before and after the flip — the withRole wrapper precedes the gate). deployments.name: gpt-5
deployments.dataProcessing: GlobalStandard = inference may process in ANY Azure region (data at rest stays uksouth); no UK data zone exists (DataZone is US/EU only) and uksouth has no regional-Standard gpt-5 quota — Global is the only gpt-5 option here

value.miGrants: cespk-orch-dev MI (principal ad47e928-c6b5-4b24-895a-0500a9f5b22d) now holds Cognitive Services OpenAI User (5e0bd9bd) on this account — role assignment d695d697-ba96-42c4-a958-3cd61d868bb0, applied 2026-07-02 via ARM PUT (rules-engine-v2 Phase 4 keyless prerequisite; verified via roleAssignments list). The cespk-api-dev MI (principal 51dcdd5f-7802-40e6-9388-18b66e006e71) ALSO holds Cognitive Services OpenAI User (5e0bd9bd) on this account since 2026-07-05 (ARM PUT, verified via role assignment list) - the keyless prerequisite for the TKT-060 AI chat helper (POST /api/assistant/chat). The disableLocalAuth flip stays operator-gated (docs/gated.md D6).
value.wiring: EMAIL_AI is LIVE (2026-07-03): EMAIL_AI_ENABLED=true + AI_MODEL_ENDPOINT + AI_MODEL_DEPLOYMENT=gpt-5 set on cespk-orch-dev (user-instructed production flip; per-provider work_provider.ai_allowed opt-out implemented + deployed FIRST - explicit false skips with provider_ai_opt_out). Suggestion-only posture unchanged: PII-scrubbed AOAI call for abstain/uncorroborated rows, writes ai_suggestion rows for human accept/reject. Was: Code path DEPLOYED but GATED-OFF (2026-07-02 Phase-4 deploy): orchestration triage-classify now carries the real AOAI structured-output call (MSI/keyless, PII-scrubbed, suggestion-only) — dead until the operator sets EMAIL_AI_ENABLED / AI_MODEL_ENDPOINT / AI_MODEL_DEPLOYMENT (all still absent from app-settings; gated.md D6). A/B smoke with the operator token against gpt-5 succeeded 2026-07-02 (3/3 structured responses); gpt-5-mini NOT deployed (404).

csvComparison.sourceCommand: cut -d',' -f1 on both CSVs vs mcp__azure__group_resource_list output
csvComparison.recommendation: Both root CSVs are STALE/superseded — they predate the API/orchestration/SPA/Postgres/Box/Foundry deployment and omit all of those core live resources. Safe to delete; the live registry (docs/architecture/live-environment.md) + mcp__azure__group_resource_list are authoritative.
